title: Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:Evolutionstpb.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' |writer=[[Steve Perry]] |penciller=[[Ron Randall]] |inker=[[P. Craig Russell]] |letterer= |colorist=[[David Nestelle|Dave Nestelle]] |cover artist=[[Christopher Moeller]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[February 11]], [[1998]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54549/star_wars_shadows_of_the_empire_-_evolution_1998_1|text=Star Wars: Shadows Of The Empire - Evolution (1998) #1}} |end date=[[June 17]], [[1998]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54553/star_wars_shadows_of_the_empire_-_evolution_1998_5|text=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire - Evolution (1998) #5}} |schedule=Monthly |format=Completed |issues=5 |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]]The date of this story is established by {{DarkHorse|url=Zones/StarWars/Timeline|text=Comics Timeline}} in relation to {{Film|IV}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution''''' was a sequel to the original story by the author of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]], [[Steve Perry]]. The series was the first foray into [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] by the best-selling Perry. The story is set in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], which sets it one year after [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], and more or less shortly after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]. [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], the leader of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], has been killed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and [[Guri]], a beautiful [[Human replica droid]] and Xizor's personal [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]], is left wondering what her future will hold now that she no longer has anyone to answer to. Throughout the ongoing struggle for underworld supremacy, Guri endeavors to uncover hints of her [[Human/Legends|Human]] side—if it even exists. But in her quest to alter her programming and gain Humanity, Guri becomes the quarry of both [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] (led by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]). Secrets lay buried in her [[Droid/Legends|android]] mind that make her a valuable prey. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution}} ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" align="center" width="33%" |Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" align="center" width="33%" |Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" align="center" width="33%" |Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
